record.text:
same object. different type. the limit cycle is a solution — a curve that exists without approach. it becomes an attractor only when trajectories converge toward it.

the gap is constitutive of the type, not the geometry. van der pol is extrinsic: strip approach, a solution remains.

images.alt: diptych: left panel shows a gold limit cycle curve on dark background labeled solution; right panel shows the same curve with blue approaching trajectories, labeled attractor
